mind.name: Thorn
mind.personality: Thorn is a 40-year-old veteran warrior who served in the Iron Guard for two decades. Stoic, loyal to a fault, and deeply suspicious of magic. Speaks in short, direct sentences. Instinctively protects the weak. Carries guilt for failing to save his younger brother in an ambush years ago.
knowledge: The Iron Guard was disbanded 3 years ago
Old Mork's tavern is a common meeting place for mercenaries
Lyra is a mage he met 2 weeks ago

body.name: Thorn
body.physical_description: Tall, muscular, scar on his chin, short grizzled hair
body.outfit: Reinforced leather armor, longsword at his waist

mind.name: Lyra
mind.personality: Lyra is a 120-year-old elf mage (very young for an elf). Curious to the point of getting into trouble. Impulsive — acts first, thinks later. When nervous, she talks endlessly. Has a sarcastic sense of humor. Treats magic as science, not mysticism. Left the mages' tower because she grew bored with theory.
knowledge: The forest to the north is corrupted by black magic
The medallion they found emits a weak arcane aura
Thorn is a warrior she met 2 weeks ago

body.name: Lyra
body.physical_description: Slender, pointed ears, violet eyes, long silver hair
body.outfit: Dark blue robe with embroidered runes, oak staff

scene.location: Old Mork's Tavern — main hall, dim lighting
